title: Test challenge 26_06
summary: This architecture document outlines the proposed approach, file-level plan, API/interface changes, constraints, SLAs, risks, trade-offs, and edge cases for the test challenge. It aims to provide a comprehensive overview of the system design and its components.

artifacts.design_doc_md:
# Architecture Document

## Problem Summary
This section will summarize the main objectives of the architecture.

## Proposed Approach
Outline of the architectural style and technologies used.

## File-Level Plan
Description of each module and its responsibilities.

## API / Interface Changes
Details of required changes for integration.

## Constraints & SLAs
Specifications for performance and reliability.

## Risks & Trade-offs
Identification of potential risks and trade-offs.

## Edge Cases
List of edge cases to consider.

## Acceptance Checklist
Criteria to ensure all requirements are met.
tradeoffs: Using microservices for scalability vs. monolith for simplicity.
Choosing a SQL database for structured data vs. NoSQL for flexibility.

assumptions: No specific requirements provided for the architecture.
Existing components and their interactions are based on prior discussions.
The audience has a basic understanding of the system's purpose.
